---
title: "Music"
---

Some of the works are available on [YouTube](https://youtube.com/@harukiyagi?feature=shared).

- All my composing is done on a computer; I cannot play any instruments. 
- I do enjoy humming tunes.
- I often listen to soundtracks that enhance movies and games, though I rarely enjoy the films or games themselves.
- I know a little about classical music, but I've never had formal musical training and only possess a superficial understanding.

Some of my favorite pieces include:

- "Gusty Garden Galaxy" from "Super Mario Galaxy"
- "4X4" from "Back to the Future"
- John Williams' "Summon The Heroes"
- "Le jardin féerique" from Ravel's "Ma mère l’Oye"
- "Stand Alone" from NHK Special Drama "Saka No Ue No Kumo"
- All Rainbow Road BGM from the Mario Kart series
